creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
I'm confused about the reclassification to: kern

The headers in question are not kernel headers and are not
using any conditional preprocessing to do anything different
for the kernel context vs. non-kernel contexts.

So why would the Component be kern ?

Note: I agree that "arm" was not appropriate, given the
multi-platform use of having an mb() definition.
